records.statement: deacon can auto-forward container ports to the host via a host-side daemon backed by a per-container registry and PID markers; the reference CLI does not model a host-side port-forward daemon.
records.notes: Deacon-only capability (feature 015-auto-forward-ports). Recorded by ext-auto-forward-ports; backed by case-auto-forward. Uses host-side forwarded_ports.json and forward_daemon_<container_id> markers under the user-data folder.
